name: Mitigation of Statute of Limitations

eligibility.description: Requires a final court decision, closing agreement, or final refund claim disposition as defined in Section 1313.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers to correct errors in closed tax years (where the statute of limitations has expired) if a 'determination' in an open year creates an inconsistency.
